name: @nityamkaushik/movsync
description: Play MKV, HEVC, AV1, HDR videos in the browser. WebCodecs + FFmpeg WASM player with encrypted playback, chapters, subtitles, multi-audio tracks. No server transcoding needed.

scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
scripts.build:wasm: mkdir -p dist/wasm && docker compose run --rm build
scripts.build:wasm:force: mkdir -p dist/wasm && docker compose run --rm -e FORCE_FFMPEG=true -e FORCE_DAV1D=true build
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build:ts && npm run typecheck
scripts.docs:deploy: npm run docs:build && npx gh-pages -d docs/.vitepress/dist
scripts.app:deploy: cd app && cp worker.js worker.js.bak && sed -i '' "s|\"__BUILD_VERSION__\"|\"$(date +%s)\"|" worker.js && npx wrangler deploy; mv worker.js.bak worker.js
scripts.app:upload: npm run app:harden && wrangler r2 object put movi-assets/element.js --file dist/element.js --remote
scripts.app:upload:local: wrangler r2 object put movi-assets/element.js --file dist/element.js --local --persist-to app/.wrangler/state
scripts.app:release: npm run build:ts && npm run app:upload && npm run app:deploy

author: Nityam Kaushik <nityamkaushik@gmail.com> (https://github.com/nityamkaushik)
